document_title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Thames Water gated allowance appendix

key_decisions.decision: Thames Water asset improvement gated allowance
key_decisions.detail: Up to £500m water + £500m wastewater = £1,000m total. Thames originally requested £677m (WAAP), revised to £1,044m

key_decisions.decision: Thames Water growth at STWs gated allowance
key_decisions.detail: Up to £250m gated allowance for growth at sewage treatment works
Gate 0 through Gate 5 with independent third-party assurance at each stage before expenditure released

glossary_terms.definition: Water Asset Assurance Programme — Thames Water's programme for water asset health improvements
London Water Infrastructure Conditional Allowance — conditional allowance for London trunk and distribution main renewals, carried over from PR19
Expenditure released in stages subject to passing independent assurance gates
